subcodes.first_line: O true friends! That land, during the days of the Blessed Beauty, was a flaming fire and a shining lamp, meaning from the radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی آن بلد در ایام مبارک شعله نار بود و سراج پرانوار یعنی از پرتو
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom
